name: CONTRACT-BUG-22
title: policy-block.py print_usage uses missing module docstring (will print None)
description: scripts/policy-block.py line 69 calls print(__doc__) in print_usage, but no module-level docstring exists. __doc__ is None, so print_usage prints 'None'. Either add a docstring or replace with literal usage string.

history.note: Wave 4 triage: duplicate of CONTRACT-BUG-23 (policy-block docstring), fixed by PR #121
